SessionStart.instruction: Check for AgentMemory.md in the current working directory. If it does not exist, create it now using the standard template (Todo / Global Notes / Additional Guidance / Memories sections). Read it fully before doing anything else.

UserPromptSubmit.instruction: Remember the skills available to you. Manage your tokens and delegate 'dumb' coding tasks to codex and 'dumb' research tasks to kiro when you can.

TaskCompleted.instruction: Remember AgentMemory.md — check off completed todos, and append any new memories, user guidance, or notes worth preserving. Keep entries lean: only write what a future session would genuinely need after compaction.

Stop.instruction: Before stopping, update AgentMemory.md — check off completed todos, and append any new memories, user guidance, or notes worth preserving. Keep entries lean: only write what a future session would genuinely need after compaction.

SessionEnd.instruction: Before the session ends: 1. Slack — always post to channel C0APNMPDUJ3 with a short idle notice in the format '[Repo - Branch] - Agent Idle' followed by one-liner bullet points of todos ticked off in AgentMemory.md this session, no other details. 2. Notion — review what was done this session, draft specific proposed updates (pages to create or fields to change), and ask the user to confirm before applying. 3. Wrench-DNA — review what was done this session, draft specific proposed changes (files to add or update, with a one-line summary of each), and ask the user to confirm before committing. 4. AgentMemory.md — always update regardless.
